## Problem

What problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Impact Area

Which part of pi-lcm does this affect?

- [ ] Message persistence
- [ ] Compaction engine
- [ ] Agent tools (grep/describe/expand)

- [ ] TUI / user interface
